reviews.review_description:
If you played snake before you know what to expect, yea it was cool and relaxing but I dont think it was worth $3. The problem with the game is it takes too long to get a proper Giant snake tail going, So games last too long. And the vs mode was even worse. The pieces to make your snake long were doubled which was great but my snake seemed like it was growing 2x slower.  

Good idea and looks cool I just wish the snake would grow faster cuz i get sleepy waiting.

developer_response.body: This guy is right. It will be fixed in the next update.

reviews.review_title: Masterpiece with a lot of potential
reviews.review_description:
Snake 3D VR is not your average snake game; it's a unique and immersive experience that takes a classic concept to new heights. The game places you in a cockpit, complete with sound speakers and visually stunning menus, making you feel like you're piloting your own snake in a virtual world.

Gameplay and Mechanics

The gameplay is smooth and intuitive, offering a well-balanced challenge that keeps you engaged. The AI-controlled snakes are formidable opponents, ensuring that you're always on your toes. The controls are responsive, and the game mechanics are easy to grasp but hard to master, which adds to its replay value.

Features and Updates

The developer has announced upcoming features like an auto-pilot mode for idle gameplay, showing a commitment to continuous improvement. They also seem to be very receptive to community feedback, promising to take reviews to heart in future updates.

Value for Money

The game is priced incredibly reasonably, especially considering the quality of the design and the overall gaming experience it offers. This makes it easy to support the developer and their vision for the game.

Future Prospects

With its unique interpretation of a classic game style and a developer who is clearly passionate about their work, Snake 3D VR has a bright future ahead. I'm excited to see where this game goes and how it evolves over time.

Conclusion

Snake 3D VR offers a fresh, engaging experience that both newcomers and veterans of the genre will appreciate. Its upcoming features and the developer's openness to feedback make it a game worth keeping an eye on. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a unique and immersive gaming experience.

This is a pretty accurate VR interpretation of snake.io gameplay. So if you’re a fan of that, this is great :)

Controls took a little while to get used to, but I was soon shooting round the play area once I got the hang of it. The gameplay feels solid, especially playing against the AI.

Great value at this price!

Will update, but first impressions are satisfactory. First person perspective, ship off, no vignette, full immersion. Bed mode is an appreciated feature inclusion! Very smooth, fun and easy to operate. Multiplayer will make this a very high quality product. Thankful to the dev(s) for crafting clean software.

This is a great example of how classic flat games can take on a whole new life in VR. I really love the concept here: it's snake in 3D.

Although currently in a simple form, this game could be really huge.

Some ideas to consider:
- bigger arenas
- turn on/off the cockpit visuals
- adjustable viewpoints (behind snake's head, above snake's head, snake's point of view)
- adjustable speeds/throttle control; current speed is a little slow
- more dynamic visuals: psychedelic patterns, explosive colors, etc would really bring this to life.
- multiplayer game mode!

The fundamentals and basic mechanics are already smooth and polished. I hope the devs are still considering working on this incredibly solid start to a great game.

l i n k t r. e e / q u a c k b i r t h

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. Some of your ideas are implemented already in the hand menu (viewpoints, spaceship visibility). I am currently working on bigger maps and online modes, but focusing my energy on the mobile version. Unfortunately the VR version is on-hold for now.

reviews.review_description:
If you’ve ever played snakes before and you like it, then this is your perfect game

Definitely 👍 Worth the money
